summary: Contract engagement to resolve critical V8 heap out-of-memory crashes in a construction technology application by refactoring eager-loading queries to paginated endpoints, implementing autocomplete search functionality, and updating Vue.js frontend components to consume new APIs. Short-term 16-20 hour project with isolated problem files ready on Day 1.

prioritySignals.reason: Core issue involves active OOM crashes from unpaginated eager-loading queries; must track down memory issues via logs
Backend stack is explicitly Node.js based; strong experience required for refactoring
Database queries involve INNER JOIN/LEFT OUTER JOIN across tbl_products, tbl_product_variants, tbl_assemblies
Must update dropdown selectors and estimation tables to consume paginated APIs asynchronously
Core objective is implementing LIMIT/OFFSET pagination capped at 50 items
Must adjust memory limits and process execution options on Linux environment
Listed as technical requirement for background workers/configuration management
Must build high-performance autocomplete search endpoints for catalog filtering
